rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
rateLimitedSite: Too many visits to this site. Please try again later.
forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
mcpConfigNameConflict: An MCP configuration with this name already exists.
mcpConfigReferencedByAssistant: Cannot delete: this MCP is still mounted on one or more assistants. Remove it from Assistant management first.
skillConfigNameConflict: A Skill with this name already exists.
skillConfigReferencedByAssistant: Cannot delete: this Skill is still mounted on one or more assistants. Remove it from Assistant management first.
skillPackFilePathConflict: A file already exists at the target path.
mcpCredentialsEncryptionUnavailable: Server is not configured with MCP_CREDENTIALS_MASTER_KEY; credentials cannot be saved.
internalError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
saveFailedRetry: Could not save. Please try again later.
serverConfigCannotSaveSecrets: Server configuration error; API keys cannot be saved.

mcpTest.credentialsDecryptFailed: Credentials could not be decrypted. Check server keys or re-save credentials.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordNeedsLetterAndNumber: Password must include both letters and numbers.
validation.passwordSameAsEmail: Password cannot be the same as your email.
validation.contentInvalid: Message must be a non-empty string.
validation.contentTooLong: Message is too long. Maximum {max} characters.
validation.limitRange: Must be an integer from 1 to 50.
validation.stringOrNull: Must be a string or null.
validation.emailImmutable: Email cannot be changed via this API.
validation.profileFieldRequired: Provide at least nickName or telNo.
validation.preferenceFieldRequired: At least one preference field is required.
validation.modelConfigIdInvalid: Must be a non-empty string or null.
validation.preferredKnowledgeTopKRange: preferredKnowledgeTopK must be an integer from 1 to 20, or null.
validation.preferredKnowledgeThresholdRange: preferredKnowledgeThreshold must be a number from 0 to 1, or null.
validation.preferredKnowledgeChunkSizeRange: preferredKnowledgeChunkSize must be an integer from 200 to 4000, or null.
validation.preferredKnowledgeChunkOverlapRange: preferredKnowledgeChunkOverlap must be an integer from 0 to 1000, or null.
validation.paginationParamsInvalid: Invalid pagination: page must be ≥ 1; pageSize must be 1–{maxPageSize}.
validation.scopeInvalid: scope must be all, system, or personal.
validation.invalidModelProvider: Provider must be one of: ALYUN, GLM, DEEPSEEK, KIMI, SILICONFLOW.
validation.apiKeyStringRequired: API key must be a string.
validation.systemAssistantNotCreatable: System assistants cannot be created from the console.
validation.invalidKnowledgeBaseIds: One or more knowledge bases are invalid or inaccessible.
validation.invalidMcpConfigIds: One or more MCP configurations are invalid.
validation.mcpConfigIdsRequired: mcpConfigIds must be an array (may be empty).
validation.mcpConfigIdsStringArray: mcpConfigIds must be an array of strings.
validation.mcpConfigMaxPerAssistant: At most {max} MCP configurations per assistant.
validation.mcpConfigNameUnique: Name must be unique under your account (max {maxLength} characters).
validation.skillContentMaxLength: Content must be at most {max} characters.
validation.skillContentDeprecated: The content field is deprecated; manage pack files via the files API.
validation.skillMdRequiredOnImport: Import must include a non-empty root SKILL.md.
validation.skillPackFileTooLarge: File exceeds the maximum size of {max} bytes.
validation.skillPackFileCountExceeded: Pack exceeds the maximum of {max} files.
validation.skillPackNotUtf8: File must be valid UTF-8 text.
validation.skillMdDeleteForbidden: Cannot delete the only SKILL.md in this pack.
validation.skillConfigIdsRequired: skillConfigIds must be an array (may be empty).
validation.skillConfigIdsStringArray: skillConfigIds must be an array of strings.
validation.skillConfigMaxPerAssistant: At most {max} Skill configurations per assistant.
validation.skillConfigNameUnique: Name must be unique under your account (max {maxLength} characters).
validation.invalidSkillConfigIds: One or more Skill configuration IDs are invalid.
validation.modelTagsArrayRequired: tags must be an array of strings.
validation.assistantTagsArrayRequired: tags must be an array of strings.
validation.tagMustBeString: Each tag must be a string.
validation.assistantTagMaxLength: Each tag must be at most {max} characters.
validation.mcpCredentialsStringOrNull: Credentials must be a string or null.
validation.mcpCredentialsEmptyString: Empty string is not allowed; omit the field to skip.
validation.mcpCredentialsOmitToKeep: Omit credentials to keep unchanged; null cannot clear.
validation.mcpDescriptionStringOrNull: Description must be a string or null.
validation.mcpEndpointObjectRequired: endpoint must be a JSON object.
validation.mcpStdioCommandRequired: stdio transport requires a non-empty command.
validation.mcpEndpointArgsStringArray: endpoint.args must be an array of strings.
validation.mcpMetadataObjectOrNull: metadata must be a JSON object or null.
validation.invalidUserStatus: status must be Active or Disabled.
validation.atLeastOneUpdateField: Provide at least one field to update.

promptConfig.itemsRequired: items must be a non-empty array.
promptConfig.itemMustBeObject: Each item must be an object.
promptConfig.onlyKeyValueAllowed: Only key and value fields are allowed.

template.invalidBrace: Template contains invalid "{" placeholders. Use {paramName} only; names must match declared parameters below.

conversationSummary.integerRange: Must be an integer from {min} to {max}.
conversationSummary.modeEnum: mode must be tokens or messages.

knowledgeBase.tagsArrayRequired: tags must be an array of strings.
knowledgeBase.tagMaxLength: Each tag must be at most {max} characters.
knowledgeBase.contentFormatEnum: contentFormat must be markdown or plain.
knowledgeBase.sourceTypeTextOnly: Only sourceType "text" is supported in this release.
knowledgeBase.nameConflict: A knowledge base with this name already exists.
knowledgeBase.topKRange: topK must be an integer from 1 to 20.
knowledgeBase.thresholdRange: threshold must be a number from 0 to 1.

captchaInvalid: Verification code is incorrect or expired. Refresh and try again.

authAccountDisabled: This account is unavailable. Contact an administrator.
authEmailTaken: This email is already registered. Sign in instead.

authLoginLocked: Too many failed sign-in attempts. {minutes, plural, one {Try again in # minute.} other {Try again in # minutes.}}
conversationNotFound: This conversation does not exist or was removed.
assistantNotFound: The selected assistant does not exist or is unavailable.
knowledgeBaseReferencedByAssistant: Cannot delete: this knowledge base is still linked to one or more assistants. Remove it from Assistant management first.
knowledgeBaseChunkTestUnavailable: Vectorization is not complete; chunk test is unavailable.

modelError: The model failed to respond. Try again later.
readOnlyAccountBlocked: This test account is read-only. You cannot create, edit, or delete data.
